allow: Bash(ruby -e 'require "json"; data = JSON.parse\(File.read\("/home/santo/OutreachAi/data/posts_with_scott_reply_threads.json"\)\); post = data.find {|p| p["id"] == "090"}; post["threads"].each {|t| author = t["comment"]["author"]; puts "Author: [#{author.inspect}] length=#{author.length}"}')

Bash(ruby -e 'require "json"; data = JSON.parse\(File.read\("/home/santo/OutreachAi/data/posts_with_scott_reply_threads.json"\)\); post = data.find {|p| p["id"] == "090"}; puts JSON.pretty_generate\(post["threads"][0].keys\); puts "---"; post["threads"].each {|t| puts t.keys.inspect}')

Bash(ruby -e 'require "json"; data = JSON.parse\(File.read\("/home/santo/OutreachAi/data/posts_with_scott_reply_threads.json"\)\); post = data.find {|p| p["id"] == "090"}; post["threads"].each {|t| puts t["comment"]["author"].inspect; t["replies"].each {|r| puts "  reply: #{r["author"].inspect}"}}')
